global.description: The ad features a combination of text and graphic elements promoting travel booking.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book their next trip with special fares.

elements.label: Trip booking message
elements.description: Bold white text that reads 'Book your next trip Special fares today', prominently displayed in the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip Special fares today

elements.label: NomadLayer logo
elements.description: The logo 'NomadLayer' is displayed at the top of the ad in a clear, bold font, likely in white against a blue background.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom of the ad with the text 'Shop now' in white, set against a blue background.
